name: #473 · 01e335a2b533e5bb976e65e1ee4c56666432ab78 · Michał Kruk · feat(daemon): auto-shutdown after CDP idle timeout (default 30min)

newTests.name: Unit tests for CDP idle auto-shutdown timer > schedule and cancel > schedules a future on disconnect when cdp-connected is true

Unit tests for CDP idle auto-shutdown timer > schedule and cancel > cancels scheduled future on connect
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > cdp-idle-timeout returns current timeout value in SCI
Unit tests for CDP idle auto-shutdown timer > schedule and cancel > does not schedule when timeout is 0 (disabled)
Unit tests for CDP idle auto-shutdown timer > schedule and cancel > does not schedule when cdp-connected was false
